projects.name: CarePath Evidence Navigator
projects.short_description: A citation-first retrieval system for searching synthetic care-protocol documents.
projects.problem_solved: Reduced time spent locating supporting passages across fragmented clinical operations guidance.
projects.measurable_result: Retrieved a reviewer-approved supporting passage in the top three results for 87% of 120 synthetic evaluation questions.

projects.name: ShelfSense Demand Forecaster
projects.short_description: A weekly demand forecasting pipeline for synthetic store and product histories.
projects.problem_solved: Improved replenishment planning for products with seasonal and promotion-driven demand.
projects.measurable_result: Lowered mean absolute percentage error from 24.8% to 18.6% on a twelve-week synthetic holdout set.

projects.name: ModelWatch Release Guard
projects.short_description: A lightweight release and monitoring workflow for containerized prediction services.
projects.problem_solved: Made model-quality regression and feature drift visible before and after deployment.
projects.measurable_result: Detected all eight seeded quality regressions and reduced manual release checks from 42 to 15 minutes in repeated trials.

projects.name: ForgeSight Defect Inspector
projects.short_description: An image classifier for identifying surface defects in a public, non-identifying component-image dataset.
projects.problem_solved: Prioritized likely defective components for manual inspection.
projects.measurable_result: Reached 91% macro F1 on a held-out test split and cut review volume by 38% at the selected threshold.

projects.name: LedgerLens Anomaly Triage
projects.short_description: An explainable anomaly-ranking workflow for synthetic general-ledger transactions.
projects.problem_solved: Helped reviewers prioritize unusual entries without presenting the model as a fraud determination.
projects.measurable_result: Placed 76% of seeded anomalies in the highest-ranked 10% of transactions on the synthetic test set.

projects.name: GridPulse Load Forecaster
projects.short_description: A short-horizon load forecasting study using public weather and power-demand series.
projects.problem_solved: Compared reproducible forecasting baselines for day-ahead operational planning.
projects.measurable_result: Improved mean absolute error by 12% over a seasonal-naive baseline across four rolling validation windows.

projects.name: CatalogCompass Recommender
projects.short_description: A hybrid product recommender evaluated on synthetic customer interactions and item metadata.
projects.problem_solved: Improved discovery for low-interaction products while retaining transparent offline evaluation.
projects.measurable_result: Raised recall at 10 from 0.31 to 0.39 versus a popularity baseline on the synthetic evaluation set.

projects.name: SupportSignal Intent Router
projects.short_description: A transformer-based classifier and API for routing synthetic internal support requests.
projects.problem_solved: Reduced manual first-pass categorization of incoming support text.
projects.measurable_result: Achieved 88% macro F1 across six synthetic intent classes and served predictions below 140 ms median latency in local tests.
